nodes.label: Plants Around Us
nodes.description: Types and uses of plants in our daily life

nodes.label: Types of Plants
nodes.description: Plants are grouped by size, stem, and how they grow

nodes.label: Trees
nodes.description: Tall plants with thick, woody trunks (mango, neem, banyan)

nodes.label: Shrubs
nodes.description: Medium plants with many thin branches (rose, tulsi, hibiscus)

nodes.label: Herbs
nodes.description: Small plants with soft green stems (mint, coriander, wheat)

nodes.label: Climbers & Creepers
nodes.description: Climbers grow upward on support; creepers spread on ground

nodes.label: Uses of Plants
nodes.description: The many ways plants help people and the environment

nodes.label: Food
nodes.description: Fruits, vegetables, grains, spices from different plant parts

nodes.label: Clean Air
nodes.description: Plants release oxygen and take in carbon dioxide

nodes.label: Wood & Paper
nodes.description: Furniture, houses, paper, and rubber come from trees

nodes.label: Medicine
nodes.description: Tulsi, neem, aloe vera used for healing and health

nodes.label: Protect Soil
nodes.description: Roots hold soil and prevent erosion by rain and wind
